data.name: Futaland
data.detailed_description:
What’s the worst that could happen during an ordinary day at a biology university with your friends? Well, besides your crazy friend starting a zombie apocalypse with a love potion meant to make their crush fall for them!

About the Game Futaland is a thrilling Visual Novel where a simple mistake leads to a catastrophic disaster. When a close friend accidentally triggers a zombie outbreak within the school walls, the peaceful corridors turn into a nightmare. You must step up, lead your friends, and find a way to stop the infestation before it's too late.

The Story & Your Goal Survival is not just about staying alive; it's about fixing what went wrong. As the school falls into chaos, your main goal is to navigate through the infected zones and halt the spread of the virus.

Meet the Survivors You are accompanied by a group of unique characters, each with their own story and role in this disaster:

Miella: A yellow-haired futanari (deeply in love with Roxelane). I'm sure you'll love her a lot.

Roxelane: The most beautiful girl on the team with orange hair. I'm sure you'll adore her.

Mayro: A sweet femboy with blue hair, and incredibly affectionate. You'll fall in love with him instantly.

data.short_description: What’s the worst that could happen during an ordinary day at a biology university with your friends? Well, besides your crazy friend starting a zombie apocalypse with a love potion meant to make their crush fall for them
data.supported_languages:
英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 保加利亞文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 繁體中文, 日文, 韓文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 波蘭文, 匈牙利文, 挪威文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 希臘文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 印地語*, 希伯來文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 / AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 / AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 / 1 GB VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.15 (Catalina)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or Apple M1/M2/M3 chip
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal-capable GPU (Integrated Intel HD 6000 or Apple Silicon GPU)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.15 (Catalina) or higher
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or Apple M1/M2/M3 chip
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal-capable GPU (Integrated Intel HD 6000 or Apple Silicon GPU)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0+ or Vulkan compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or SteamOS
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0+ or Vulkan compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
